_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: The MPNST ST88-14 cell line already had relatively high baseline total and phosphorylated PDGFRβ protein levels, and MEKi treatment in ST88-14 did not further increase the total or phosphorylated PDGFRβ protein levels
details: Already had relatively high baseline total and phosphorylated PDGFRβ protein levels, MEK inhibitor treatment did not further increase these levels
